content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: boundary_expiry
P: if(expMs<nowMs-grace_clock_skew) → return → res.status(401) → json → error:expired_token
V: test_boundary_expiry_grace
R: ! potentiallyallowingtokenswithin30seconds
A: adjustedexpirycheckwithgraceperiod

[AUDIT]
Ensure graceful expiry handling.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: cmp(expMs,nowMs)
P: if(expMs+30000>nowMs) → returnres.status(401)
V: unit ∧ test(boundary_expiry)
R: ! auth_regression
A: minimal_patch ∧ one_test

[AUDIT]
Address token expiry to account for clock skew and ensure compatibility and security.

P: Δ(<=) → add(regression_test)  
V: unit ∧ test(boundary_expiry)  
R: ! auth_regression

Address token expiry to account for clock skew and ensure compatibility and security.
